# External Oracle Tools

These are not vendored by default. Use them in CI/dev environments where available.

```text
qpdf           structural PDF checks and QDF inspection
veraPDF        PDF/A and PDF/UA validation
poppler-utils  pdftotext/pdftoppm comparison
mupdf-tools    mutool draw/show comparison
ghostscript    print/prepress/rasterisation comparison
pandoc         source-format conversion provider
libreoffice    office conversion provider
```

Do not assume an oracle is always correct. Store disagreements as classified reports.
